svg.title: JEO Technology
svg.desc: Technology strategy, secure platforms, AI enablement, and developer systems for organisations that need practical engineering leadership. JEO Technology helps teams design, secure, and optimise the systems they rely on. The work is grounded in clear boundaries, durable documentation, and repeatable delivery patterns.

g.text: TECHNOLOGY FOR BUSINESS. NOT JUST IT.
